description.value: Your limbs' myriad suckers provide you unrivaled grip strength,. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to Athletics checks to [[/act force-open]], and you don't take an item penalty when Forcing something Open for not having a crowbar or other suitable tool. When you roll a success on a check to Force Open, you get a critical success instead. In addition, while you're in contact with a floor or other solid surface, you gain a +1 circumstance bonus to your Fortitude and Reflex DCs against attempts to [[/act disarm]], [[/act reposition]], [[/act shove]], or [[/act trip]] you.
